title: Double Trouble
description: Two rivals have published wrong theories. You know the truth about both — clear the board.

hints.text: Two publications, two targets. Your clues fully establish the true aspects of ingredient 1 and ingredient 6. Each one can be debunked independently with an apprentice reveal — you just need one valid colour per ingredient.

Ingredient 1: true npN vs claimed pNn. R and G both disprove (− vs +, and + vs −). Ingredient 6: true Ppn vs claimed nPp. R and B both disprove (+ vs −, and − vs +). Any valid colour for each gives you a 2-step plan.
Two-step plan: ① Apprentice on ingredient 1 — reveal R (or G). ② Apprentice on ingredient 6 — reveal R (or B). Steps can be done in either order.
